parsedContent.feedback: Good effort, but not all answers are correct. You mentioned CDDVDUSBcasets, but casets is not a correct example of an external storage device. You also mentioned CD/DVD, which is correct, but you need to provide 4 examples. You correctly mentioned USB and memory card (SD card).
parsedContent.correctedAnswer: CD/DVD, USB, memory card (SD card), external hard drive
